name: Coastal Calm
flavorHeadline: Bright, fresh — FL tomatoes, poblano, cilantro, lime
heatDescriptor: A gentle gust — big flavor, little fire
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Coastal Calm EF-1 hot sauce with a golden-yellow label
productStory: Coastal Calm is the pristine morning before the atmosphere turns violent. We built this mild, vibrant blend for palates that demand complex flavor without the overwhelming fire. Sun-ripened Florida tomatoes, crisp poblano, and bright lime coalesce into a flawless, breezy finish. The calm before the storm.
pairings: Fresh oysters on the half shell
